## Checklist

- [ ] Skills follow the standard SKILL.md frontmatter structure (`name`, `description`)
- [ ] All non-setup skills reference `EA_PROFILE.md`
- [ ] Evals updated or added for any new/changed skill behaviour
- [ ] `plugin.json` version bumped if this is a releasable change
- [ ] README updated if skills were added, removed, or renamed
- [ ] No secrets, API keys, or personal paths committed
